examples: Analysis by gel electrophoresis revealed slight differences in amino acid sequence of the enzymes of two of the four pairs.
The molecular weight was determined by tricine gel electrophoresis.
When the immunoprecipitate was subjected to SDS agarose gel electrophoresis, 3 radioactive bands were obtained, one of which corresponded to pure human albumin in its position.
Electrophoresis can pick up these size differences, and thus identify the mutations involved.
When she was working again, in a lab at a medical-research park in Eastview, surrounded by test tubes and electrophoresis trays, she had a lot of time to think about Grisha.
